---
title: ""
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- HERO -->
<div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg,#0d2b45,#1a4a6e); color:white; padding:1rem 2rem;">
  <div style="max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto;">

    <p style="color:#c8d8e8;">I'm always happy to discuss research collaborations, questions, or opportunities.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TWO COLUMN LAYOUT -->
<div style="max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; grid-template-columns:200px 1fr; gap:1rem; padding:1rem;">

    <!-- PROFILE SIDEBAR -->
  <div>
    <div class="profile-card">
      <img src="figures/Tika_Face.JPG" alt="Tika Ram Gurung"/>
      <div class="profile-name">Tika Ram Gurung</div>
    <div class="profile-role">Ph.D. Candidate<br/>University of Nebraska-Lincoln</div>
     

<ul class="profile-links">
  <li>📍 Lincoln, NE</li>
  <li>✉️ <a href="mailto:tikargrg@gmail.com">tikargrg@gmail.com</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Tika-Ram-Gurung" target="_blank"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/5e/ResearchGate_icon_SVG.svg" width="16" height="16" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:4px;"/> ResearchGate</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=TMxdLn0AAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/c/c7/Google_Scholar_logo.svg" width="16" height="16" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:4px;"/> Google Scholar</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tika-ram-gurung-55a743a3/" target="_blank"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/c/ca/LinkedIn_logo_initials.png" width="16" height="16" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:4px;"/> LinkedIn</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4287-6150" target="_blank"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/06/ORCID_iD.svg" width="16" height="16" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:4px;"/> ORCID</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://x.com/TR_Gurung" target="_blank"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/53/X_logo_2023_original.svg" width="16" height="16" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:4px;"/> X / Twitter</a></li>
</ul>


    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
  <div>
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:1.5rem; margin-bottom:2rem;">

      <div style="background:#f0f6fb; border-radius:8px; padding:1.5rem; text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">✉️</div>
        <div style="font-weight:600; color:#1a4a6e; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Email (Academic)</div>
        <a href="mailto:tgurung3@nebraska.edu" style="color:#2e86ab; font-size:0.9rem;">tgurung3@nebraska.edu</a>
      </div>

      <div style="background:#f0f6fb; border-radius:8px; padding:1.5rem; text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">📧</div>
        <div style="font-weight:600; color:#1a4a6e; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Email (Personal)</div>
        <a href="mailto:tikargrg@gmail.com" style="color:#2e86ab; font-size:0.9rem;">tikargrg@gmail.com</a>
      </div>

      <div style="background:#f0f6fb; border-radius:8px; padding:1.5rem; text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">🔗</div>
        <div style="font-weight:600; color:#1a4a6e; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">LinkedIn</div>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tika-ram-gurung-55a743a3" target="_blank" style="color:#2e86ab; font-size:0.9rem;">View profile →</a>
      </div>

      <div style="background:#f0f6fb; border-radius:8px; padding:1.5rem; text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">📊</div>
        <div style="font-weight:600; color:#1a4a6e; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Google Scholar</div>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=TMxdLn0AAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" style="color:#2e86ab; font-size:0.9rem;">View profile →</a>
      </div>

      <div style="background:#f0f6fb; border-radius:8px; padding:1.5rem; text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">🔬</div>
        <div style="font-weight:600; color:#1a4a6e; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">ResearchGate</div>
        <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Tika-Ram-Gurung?ev=hdr_xprf" target="_blank" style="color:#2e86ab; font-size:0.9rem;">View profile →</a>
      </div>

      <div style="background:#f0f6fb; border-radius:8px; padding:1.5rem; text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">📍</div>
        <div style="font-weight:600; color:#1a4a6e; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Office</div>
        <p style="color:#4a5568; font-size:0.88rem; margin:0;">Bessey Hall-131<br/>Lincoln, NE 68588, USA</p>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div style="background:#fff8e7; border-left:4px solid #c9a84c; border-radius:0 8px 8px 0; padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;">
      <p style="font-size:0.92rem; color:#4a5568; margin:0 0 0.8rem 0;">
        🎙️ <strong>Media &amp; Podcast:</strong> Featured on the <em>University of Nebraska – Daugherty Water for Food Podcast</em> discussing the Cryosphere and Food &amp; Water Security.
      </p>
      <a href="https://open.spotify.com/episode/5yIVY0I6cBrJUxgtr8SiGZ" target="_blank"
         style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem; background:#1DB954; color:white; padding:0.5rem 1.2rem; border-radius:20px; font-size:0.88rem; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none;">
        ▶ Listen on Spotify
      </a>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <p>© 2026 Tika Ram Gurung · University of Nebraska-Lincoln</p>
</footer>
` ``
```
